message.content:
That depends on what you’re trying to achieve. Pick one:

- If you’re just testing me: ask another question (math, coding, writing, planning).
- If you need help right now: tell me your goal and any constraints (time, budget, deadline).
- If you’re unsure what to do generally: do a quick reset—drink water, stretch for 2 minutes, then choose one small task you can finish in 10–15 minutes.

If you tell me what you’re working on today, I’ll suggest the best next step.
